user_query: My friend lives in Mississauga, about an hour from downtown. What days are without any work commitments or flights?

selected_nodes.reasoning: Day 9 contains only restaurants and shopping/POI activities (brunch, Eaton Centre, boutiques, dinner). No flights or work commitments present.
Day 8 is a leisure day-trip (Niagara Falls) with restaurants; no flights or work commitments listed.
Day 7 lists museum visits, dining, and sightseeing (ROM, Distillery District, restaurants); no flights or work commitments present.
